Blackbery bush, it's over a large mound right next to the alley that Mill Street turns into behind Giant. Before H&R and YumYums. Creates good fruit, best in mid summer.

Never had trouble, people driving might give you a funny look though. Access: Public. F
1327 W Broad St, Quakertown, PA 18951, USA
Black raspberries growing along both sides of creek by road that goes from Mill St. to the Giant grocery store. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
